authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 263107, "Madden Creek", Stream, CA, Placer Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":263107,"gaz_name":"Madden Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Placer","objectid_1":1400242,"isunknowncoords":2}, mouth point (Web Mercator -13376265.399, 4734718.311 → 39.091024°N, 120.161037°W); the feature's other recorded point (Web Mercator -13379831.1963, 4731106.7684 → 39.065839°N, 120.193069°W) is the headwater near Ellis Peak. Corrects prior file coordinates (-120.17008, 39.08848), which were roughly 830 m southwest of the actual GNIS mouth point and appear to have been a guessed estimate rather than a GNIS pull; the corrected mouth point is corroborated by a Tahoe City Public Utility District CEQA filing for the Madden Creek Water System, which places the project at 39°5'10.93"N 120°9'38.64"W (≈39.08637°N, 120.16073°W) in Homewood, Placer Co.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(152) — Alphabetical List of Trout Waters with Special Fishing Regulations (Tahoe Lake and tributaries)
sources.quotedText: (152) Tahoe Lake and tributaries (Placer and El Dorado Cos.). (A) Tahoe Lake tributaries upstream to the first lake. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout (B) Tahoe Lake within 300 feet of the mouth of its tributaries. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(a)(1) — General Provisions (waters listed in subsection (b) closed except during the shown open season)
sources.quotedText: Every body of water listed in subsection (b) is closed to all fishing except during the open season as shown. Unless otherwise provided, waters shown as open to trout fishing in subsection (b), are open to fishing for other species. Gear restrictions listed in this section apply to the take of all species of fish unless otherwise noted.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40 — Alphabetical List of Hatchery Trout, Hatchery Steelhead, and Salmon Waters with Special Fishing Regulations (Madden Creek not listed)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

groups.humanSummary: Madden Creek is a west-shore Lake Tahoe tributary: it rises near Ellis Peak and flows east into Lake Tahoe near Homewood/Tahoe Pines (Placer Co.), so it is governed by the Tahoe Lake tributary special regulation, not the general trout stream season. Catch-and-release only from the Saturday preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30, artificial lures with barbless hooks only, 0 trout — and closed to all fishing the rest of the year per §7.50(a)(1). No lake lies on Madden Creek's mapped main stem, so 'upstream to the first lake' covers essentially the entire creek.
groups.verbatimText: (152) Tahoe Lake and tributaries (Placer and El Dorado Cos.). (A) Tahoe Lake tributaries upstream to the first lake. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

parameters.note: Madden Creek is a Lake Tahoe tributary and is therefore subject to §7.50(b)(152)(A) ('Tahoe Lake tributaries upstream to the first lake'), NOT the general trout stream season. Open catch-and-release only from the Saturday preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30; closed to all fishing Oct. 1 through the Friday before that Saturday per §7.50(a)(1). 'Saturday preceding Memorial Day' is encoded as the last Monday of May (Memorial Day) minus 2 days.

regulations.humanSummary: Open catch-and-release only, Saturday before Memorial Day through Sept. 30; closed to all fishing the rest of the year (Tahoe tributary special regulation).
regulations.verbatimText: (A) Tahoe Lake tributaries upstream to the first lake. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

regulations.humanSummary: 0 trout (catch-and-release) during the open catch-and-release window.
Artificial lures with barbless hooks only during the open window; no bait (gear restriction applies to all species per §7.50(a)(1)).
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license. Madden Creek is wholly within California (Placer Co.); no Nevada reciprocity applies to the creek.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+.
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
